content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To: File

Date: Feb. 11, 1983
No. T-83-036

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
        Janis Shank McLean

Subject: Telephone Advice
        Gladfelter

Interests must be returned with money within 30 days.
Official can return enough money to bring under $250. Need not return the whole amount.
